---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe it from a user perspective, not a technical one.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other projects, or extra context that would help evaluate this request.
